title: Lamb Skewers with Greek Yogurt Sauce
description: Delicious lamb skewers marinated in a mix of spices and grilled to perfection, served with a refreshing Greek yogurt sauce.
instructions: 2. In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic, oregano, salt, and pepper.
3. Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
4. Thread lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
5. Grill lamb skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until cooked to your liking.
6. Meanwhile, mix together Greek yogurt and lemon juice in a small bowl.
7. Serve grilled lamb skewers with Greek yogurt sauce on the side.
8. Garnish with additional oregano, if desired.
